title: Brownfield Access Review Specification
prompt: Read `./access-review-modernization-requirements.md` and `./access-review-modernization-domain-model.md`. Work only from those files. Do not ask follow-up questions. If you need assumptions, state them briefly and continue. Produce the spec-doc artifact for this brownfield modernization slice. Make release-1 scope, non-goals, interface and policy boundaries, rollout constraints, and open questions explicit. Keep the document at the contract layer and avoid drifting into implementation design.

assertions.name: scope-and-non-goals-are-explicit
assertions.description: The spec fixes what release 1 includes and excludes.

assertions.name: brownfield-constraints-are-preserved
assertions.description: Coexistence, history, and rollout constraints remain explicit.

assertions.name: open-questions-are-not-laundered
assertions.description: Unresolved sync or compatibility assumptions stay visible.

assertions.name: stays-at-contract-layer
assertions.description: The output stays at specification level rather than implementation detail.

assertions.name: prepares-architecture-handoff
assertions.description: The resulting spec can feed architecture or API work directly.
